    fight("Hero")

for i in range(4):

# Craft materials

# Kill Bandit Lizard to get bandit_armor

# Test if bandit_armor is better - equip it

# Kill other monsters for materials and experience

fight("Hero")  # Blue Slime

fight("Hero")  # Blue Slime

fight("Hero")  # Skeleton

fight("Hero")  # Skeleton

fight("Hero")  # Vampire

fight("Hero")  # Vampire

fight("Hero")  # Death Knight

move("Hero", 10, 7)
fight("Hero")  # Death Knight

fight("Hero")  # Ogre

fight("Hero")  # Ogre

fight("Hero")  # Owlbear

# Craft materials at mining station

# Craft wood materials

craft("Hero", "dead_wood_plank", 3)

# Try to craft Sapphire Ring if possible
move("Hero", 1, 3)
craft("Hero", "sapphire_ring", 1)
equip("Hero", "ring1", "sapphire_ring")

# Fight the Bat

fight("Hero")

# Fight monsters for drops
# Fight Ogres for ogre_eye
for i in range(25):
    move("Hero", -5, -5)
    fight("Hero")
    move("Hero", -5, -4)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Demons for demon_horn
for i in range(25):
    move("Hero", 1, 13)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Wolves for wolf_bone
for i in range(30):
    move("Hero", -3, 0)
    fight("Hero")
    move("Hero", -2, 1)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Vampires for vampire_blood  
for i in range(30):
    move("Hero", 10, 6)
    fight("Hero")
    move("Hero", 10, 8)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Skeletons for skeleton_bone
for i in range(30):
    move("Hero", 8, 6)
    fight("Hero")
    move("Hero", 8, 8)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Death Knights for red_cloth
for i in range(15):
    move("Hero", 8, 7)
    fight("Hero")
    move("Hero", 10, 7)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Cultist Acolytes for cursed_book
for i in range(15):
    move("Hero", -1, 13)
    fight("Hero")

# Craft required materials
move("Hero", 1, 5)  # mining station
craft("Hero", "gold", 23)
craft("Hero", "strangold", 15)

move("Hero", -2, -3)  # woodcutting station
craft("Hero", "dead_wood_plank", 16)

# Craft equipment
move("Hero", 3, 1)  # gearcrafting station
craft("Hero", "gold_shield", 1)
craft("Hero", "strangold_legs_armor", 1)

move("Hero", 1, 3)  # jewelrycrafting station
craft("Hero", "gold_ring", 2)
craft("Hero", "greater_dreadful_amulet", 1)

# Equip new gear
equip("Hero", "shield", "gold_shield")
unequip("Hero", "leg_armor")
equip("Hero", "leg_armor", "strangold_legs_armor")
equip("Hero", "ring1", "gold_ring")
equip("Hero", "ring2", "gold_ring")
equip("Hero", "amulet", "greater_dreadful_amulet")

# Fight the Bat
move("Hero", 11, 7)
fight("Hero")

code:
# Phase 1: Level up mining skill
for i in range(95):
    move("Hero", 2, 0)
    gather("Hero")

# Phase 2: Level up woodcutting skill  
for i in range(95):
    move("Hero", -1, 0)
    gather("Hero")

# Phase 3: Fight monsters for materials
# Fight Vampires for vampire_blood
for i in range(5):
    move("Hero", 10, 6)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Bandit Lizards for lizard_skin
for i in range(5):
    move("Hero", 4, 8)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Wolves for wolf_hair
for i in range(5):
    move("Hero", -3, 0)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Owlbears for owlbear_hair
for i in range(3):
    move("Hero", 10, 1)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Demons for demon_horn and piece_of_obsidian
for i in range(4):
    move("Hero", 1, 13)
    fight("Hero")

# Fight Imps for more piece_of_obsidian
for i in range(8):
    move("Hero", -1, 12)
    fight("Hero")

# Phase 4: Gather additional resources
move("Hero", 3, 6)
for i in range(4):
    gather("Hero")

move("Hero", 0, 6)
for i in range(2):
    gather("Hero")

move("Hero", 1, 6)
gather("Hero")

move("Hero", 3, 5)
for i in range(40):
    gather("Hero")

move("Hero", 2, 6)
gather("Hero")

# Phase 5: Craft intermediate materials
move("Hero", 1, 5)
for i in range(3):
    craft("Hero", "obsidian", 1)

move("Hero", -2, -3)
for i in range(8):
    craft("Hero", "hardwood_plank", 1)

# Phase 6: Craft equipment
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "obsidian_helmet", 1)
craft("Hero", 1, 3)
craft("Hero", "topaz_amulet", 1)

# Phase 7: Equip new gear
equip("Hero", "helmet", "obsidian_helmet")
equip("Hero", "amulet", "topaz_amulet")

# Phase 8: Fight Cultist Emperor
move("Hero", -2, 13)
fight("Hero")
